service_line_config.name: netsuite
service_line_config.tech_context: This project is built on Oracle NetSuite platform. Key technologies and concepts: - Core Modules: ERP, CRM, eCommerce (SuiteCommerce), HCM, PSA - Customization: SuiteScript 2.x (server-side and client-side), SuiteFlow, SuiteBuilder - UI: Suitelets, portlets, custom forms, SuiteCommerce Advanced (SCA) themes - Data: SuiteAnalytics, saved searches, SuiteQL, custom records and fields - Integration: SuiteTalk (SOAP/REST), RESTlets, SuiteCloud Connect, middleware (Celigo, Boomi, MuleSoft) - Workflows: SuiteFlow for approval and automation processes - Security: Roles, permissions, record-level access, IP restrictions, two-factor authentication - DevOps: SuiteCloud Development Framework (SDF), sandbox accounts, release preview - Governance: Script governance limits (usage units, API concurrency, execution time) - Environments: Production, sandbox, release preview accounts

artifact_overrides.module_extraction: Map modules to NetSuite functional areas: financials, order management, inventory, CRM, eCommerce, procurement, reporting. Focus on what is being customized or extended, not standard NetSuite configuration.
artifact_overrides.functional_req: - Specify whether a requirement uses native NetSuite features or requires SuiteScript customization - Reference NetSuite record types (transactions, entities, custom records) when relevant - For integration requirements, specify RESTlet vs SuiteTalk vs middleware approach - Note governance limit implications for bulk processing requirements
artifact_overrides.nonfunctional_req: - SuiteScript governance unit limits per script execution - API concurrency limits and rate throttling - Saved search performance for large data volumes - SuiteCommerce page load and response time requirements - Data storage and file cabinet limits - Sandbox refresh and data masking considerations
artifact_overrides.task: - SuiteBuilder configuration: custom records, fields, forms, sublists - SuiteScript development: user event, scheduled, map/reduce, client scripts - SuiteFlow workflow development and approval chains - SuiteCommerce theme and extension development - Integration: RESTlet development, middleware configuration, data mapping - Migration: CSV imports, data transformation, validation scripts - Deployment: SDF project packaging, sandbox-to-production promotion
artifact_overrides.test_case: - Test with multiple NetSuite roles to verify record-level access - Test SuiteScript governance limit boundaries with bulk data - Test saved searches and SuiteAnalytics with production-scale data volumes - Test integrations with error handling and retry scenarios - Verify workflow triggers fire correctly across transaction lifecycle
artifact_overrides.architecture: - NetSuite account topology: production, sandbox, and release preview strategy - Record model: standard vs custom records, field types, relationships - Script architecture: which script types for which use cases (user event, scheduled, map/reduce) - Integration architecture: RESTlets, SuiteTalk, middleware, data flow patterns - SuiteCommerce architecture: themes, extensions, shopping/checkout flow - Deployment architecture: SDF projects, bundles, change management
artifact_overrides.risk_entry: - Governance limit violations in high-volume processing - NetSuite release cycle impact (twice-yearly major updates) - SuiteScript API deprecation risks - Data migration complexity with interrelated transaction records - Performance degradation from excessive saved search complexity - Sandbox data limitations affecting testing accuracy
